title: RT - 3d Wrench
body:
## RS - 3D Wrench :
**is a minimalistic resource pack that focuses on high—quality processing of the standard wrench texture. If you think that the original look of the instrument is too out of line with the general style or just tired, this pack will refresh your gaming experience.**

## Main changes:
- Improved detail: The texture has been redrawn from scratch to achieve a clearer and more pleasing look.

- The color palette: A more natural metallic shade has been selected, which is in harmony with other materials in the game.

- Keeping the style: The pack does not break the vanilla atmosphere of Minecraft, but only complements it with neat details.
![Wrench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20df95277e2fa77fbf035040ec7efb790db0fa37.png)
